perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black-and-white checkered dress, stands in a brightly lit indoor room. She starts by looking down at her stomach and holding it as if she might be pregnant, with a serious facial expression. (2) She suddenly pulls a large yellow pomelo (yuzu) from behind her back/dress area, revealing that the 'bump' was just the fruit. She laughs and begins talking animatedly to the camera, using frequent hand gestures. (3) A series of screenshots and variety-show style text bubbles appear as she explains her situation. She holds the pomelo throughout the explanation, eventually smiling and waving at the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced electronic background music starts immediately. A high-pitched female voice speaks in an energetic, rapid-fire tone. (2) The music remains constant in the background while the vocal continues the explanation. Several sharp sound effects (SFX) like 'ding' and 'whoosh' are heard synchronized with text appearing on screen. (3) The speaking ends as the music reaches its final loop and cuts off.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '半路加入的，有寶寶了喔!?' (Functional Text: A user comment asking if she's pregnant). (2) '我被發現了' (Decorative/Hook Text: 'I've been found out' - humorous tone). (3) '我還沒懷孕！' (Decorative Text: 'I'm not pregnant yet!' - emphatic tone). (4) '公開男朋友' (Functional Text: 'Publicly announcing boyfriend' appearing over a screenshot of a couple).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro/Hook (Rumor) -> Reveal (The Fruit) -> Explanation (Relationship Context) -> Conclusion

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator; a man appears in a static screenshot but not live in the frame.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long, straight dark hair wearing a black-and-white checkered off-the-shoulder dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern indoor room with beige walls, an air conditioning unit, a white air purifier, and blinds covering a window.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a humorous clarification of a pregnancy rumor. The creator uses a visual gag (hiding a pomelo under her dress) to trick the audience into thinking she has a baby bump before revealing the truth. She then explains the context of her recent relationship announcement and clarifies her long-term relationship timeline to address why fans might have been confused or suspicious of a 'shotgun marriage'.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy fast-talking commentary with variety-show style text graphics.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively uses a seasonal fruit (likely related to the Mid-Autumn Festival context of pomelos) as a comedic prop to debunk social media rumors.
